settings.question: How soon will I see results?
settings.answer: Most patients see changes within the first 4 weeks. MEDVi patients typically lose 1-2 lbs per week after the first month, with 15–20% body weight loss on average over the full program.

settings.question: Are side effects common?
settings.answer: Like any medication, GLP-1s can have side effects — most commonly mild nausea or digestive changes that fade after the first weeks. Your clinician will guide dose titration to minimize them.

settings.question: How is this shipped?
settings.answer: Fast, free shipping direct from a licensed US pharmacy to your door in discreet packaging.
